description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian figure with a youthful appearance, featuring a short-sleeved fitted top and high-waisted shorts. The figure has a slim build, with arms extended horizontally and legs straight, standing in a neutral pose. The head is large in proportion to the body, with a rounded, stylized face and a full, chin-length bob hairstyle that covers the forehead and ears. The feet are clad in low-profile shoes with visible straps, and the overall body proportions are slightly exaggerated in a cartoon-like manner. The surface of the figure is smooth and matte, with clear separation between clothing, skin, and footwear. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the figure is designed to represent a typical urban pedestrian.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian in a fitted top, high-waisted shorts, and low-profile shoes, standing with arms outstretched and a bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fitted top, shorts, and full bob hairstyle covering the forehead.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the slim leg shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bob hairstyle, the back of the top and shorts, and the straight posture.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and leg, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved top and high-waisted shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
